---
title: "Heatmap Widget"
---

## Overview

Developer documentation for `HeatmapWidget`, which displays heatmap visualizations with event-aligned relative time and vertical axes.

## Source Location

`src/WhiskerToolbox/Plots/HeatmapWidget/`

## Architecture

*TODO: Document widget architecture, state management, and key classes.*

## Key Classes

- `HeatmapWidget` — Main widget class

## See Also

- [Plot Widget Guide](../plot_widget_guide.md)
